meaning: v.计算,估计,用计算机计算(或确定)
examples: At the top of the list is the notion that intelligence is measured by your ability to solve complex problems; to read, write and compute at certain levels; and to resolve abstract equations quickly.
The Six Sigma Black Belt should be able to compute the mean and standard deviation from a grouped frequency distribution.
We use a smarter method to compute the safe spending rate from retirement assets.
Zuckerberg made it clear that Open Compute offers the IT industry a win-win strategy.
